discordlinkedroles-not-configured: Shown when the extension is loaded but not configured.
discordlinkedroles-status-connected: Status message when the user is connected. $1 is the Discord username.
discordlinkedroles-status-disconnected: Status message when the user is not connected.
discordlinkedroles-connect: Button label to start the Discord OAuth flow.
discordlinkedroles-disconnect: Button label to disconnect the Discord account.
discordlinkedroles-resync: Button label to manually trigger a metadata resync.
discordlinkedroles-error-generic: Generic error message for Discord API failures.
discordlinkedroles-error-state-mismatch: Error message when the OAuth state parameter does not match.
discordlinkedroles-error-discord-already: Error when the Discord account is already linked to a different wiki account.
discordlinkedroles-error-wiki-already-li: Error when the wiki account already has a linked Discord account.
discordlinkedroles-connect-success: Success message after connecting. $1 is the Discord username.
discordlinkedroles-last-sync-at: Shows when the last successful sync occurred. $1 is the timestamp.
discordlinkedroles-last-sync-error: Shows the last sync error message. $1 is the error text.
discordlinkedroles-sync-success: Success message after a manual resync.
discordlinkedroles-group-default-desc: Default Discord metadata field description used when no group-specific message is defined. $1 is the wiki group name.
